name: Slack Reasoning Collapse
description: Collapses AI thinking/reasoning blocks in Slack messages into hidden or summarized sections instead of streaming them inline.

mode.description: How to render reasoning blocks: 'collapsed' shows a brief summary, 'hidden' strips entirely, 'inline' preserves raw output.

patterns.description: Regex patterns to detect reasoning/thinking blocks in message content.

collapsedLabel.description: Label shown in the collapsed reasoning indicator.

showSummary.description: When mode is 'collapsed', show a brief summary of the reasoning content.

summaryMaxLength.description: Max characters for the collapsed reasoning summary.
